creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
For the records, I was able to build it in poudriere 10.3 (amd64|i386) only with `MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes`.

http://poudriere.bs2.com.br/poudriere/data/103-amd64-pdbaio/2017-08-12_15h13m03s/logs/errors/riemann-c-client-1.10.1.log
